info.title: Techoo API
info.description: API for the Techoo task management application with OpenAPI documentation

session_token.description: Session token (returned when exchanging a code)

error.description: Error message describing what went wrong

code.description: Short-lived exchange code to trade for a session token

description.description: Optional longer notes for this todo

connected.description: Whether the user has a valid OAuth connection

id.description: Unique identifier for the account record

email.description: Email associated with the provider account

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the account was linked

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary calendar

isAlreadyAdded.description: Whether this calendar has already been added

calendars.description: List of available calendars from provider

isEnabled.description: Whether the calendar is enabled for sync

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the calendar was added

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the calendar was last updated

name.description: Custom display name (defaults to provider name)

calendarId.description: Calendar ID this event belongs to

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was imported

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated

post.summary: Exchange session or code for JWT
post.description: Accepts either a session token via Authorization header or a short-lived exchange code in the body. Returns a JWT token.

get.description: Look up user and session data from a bearer session token.

post.description: Create a short-lived code tied to a session token, used for OAuth redirects.

get.description: Check if the API is running
Retrieve todos with optional date range and completion filters
List posts with linked events and todos. Use `from`+`to` for a time window, or `limit`+`offset` (newest first, paginated) for all posts.

schema.description: Range start (RFC3339). Use with `to` for a time window.

parameters.description: Range start (RFC3339). Use with `to` for a time window.
parameters.name: from

schema.description: Range end (RFC3339). Use with `from` for a time window.

parameters.description: Range end (RFC3339). Use with `from` for a time window.
parameters.name: to

schema.description: Max rows: with from/to (range) caps that window (default 1000, max 10000). Without from/to (paginated feed) default 30, max 100.

parameters.description: Max rows: with from/to (range) caps that window (default 1000, max 10000). Without from/to (paginated feed) default 30, max 100.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Skip this many posts (newest-first order) when not using from/to.

parameters.description: Skip this many posts (newest-first order) when not using from/to.
parameters.name: offset

get.description: Notes list, pinned first, sorted by updated_at desc. Use limit/offset for paging.

schema.description: Skip this many notes (same order: pinned first, then updated_at desc)

parameters.description: Skip this many notes (same order: pinned first, then updated_at desc)
parameters.name: offset

patch.description: Update title, body, or pinned status. Used by auto-save (debounced).

get.description: Check if the user has a valid Google OAuth connection (via better-auth)

delete.description: Removes all calendar data associated with the Google account. Note: To fully unlink the Google account, use better-auth unlinkAccount.

get.description: Retrieve linked Google accounts for the current user
Retrieve available calendars from Google Calendar API that can be synced
Retrieve all calendars that have been added for syncing

post.description: Add a Google Calendar to be synced

400.description: Invalid request or calendar already added

get.description: Retrieve a specific calendar by ID

delete.description: Remove a calendar and delete all its synced events

post.description: Trigger a sync for a specific calendar to import latest events

401.description: Google OAuth not connected or token expired

post.description: Trigger a sync for all enabled calendars

401.description: Google OAuth not connected or token expired

get.description: Retrieve calendar events with optional filters (calendarId, startDate, endDate)

schema.description: Filter events starting from this date (inclusive)

parameters.description: Filter events starting from this date (inclusive)
parameters.name: startDate

schema.description: Filter events ending before this date (inclusive)

parameters.description: Filter events ending before this date (inclusive)
parameters.name: endDate

get.description: Retrieve a specific calendar event by ID

post.description: Start watching a calendar for push notifications when events change

401.description: Google OAuth not connected or token expired

delete.description: Stop receiving push notifications for a calendar

401.description: Google OAuth not connected or token expired

404.description: Calendar or watch channel not found

get.description: Get the current watch channel status for a calendar

delete.description: Delete the authenticated user and all their data including tenant database.

post.description: Receives push notifications from Google Calendar when events change
